creator: jsmith@resonatingmedia.com
text:
There are indeed three projects called DenyHosts (or DenyHost) and I believe I can help sort out who is who.

1. The original DenyHosts (denyhosts.sf.net) has been dead for about 10 years. There is no active development there at all.

2. A fork called DenyHost (denyhost.sf.net) was set up to fix bugs and maintain the Python 2 code base, get the sync server up and running. This project later merged with #3...

3. The DenyHosts project at GitHub (https://github.com/denyhosts/denyhosts). This is the only active fork of DenyHosts and a continuation/merge of #2. This one should be considered the upstream source for DenyHosts as it is the only one actively maintained and it has been ported to Python 3.
